text_en: Taking note of the adoption by the Economic and Social Commission for Asia and the Pacific at its seventy-fourth session, held in Bangkok from 11 to 16 May 2018, of resolution 74/5 of 16 May 2018, in which the Commission, inter alia, noted with satisfaction that the Government of Indonesia had announced that it would lead and support the transformation of the Centre for Poverty Reduction through Sustainable Agriculture into a new intergovernmental organization not affiliated with the United Nations system, and that the other members of the Governing Council of the Centre had proposed to accompany this transition process alongside Indonesia,

text_en: Approves the transformation of the Centre for Poverty Reduction through Sustainable Agriculture, previously a subsidiary body of the Economic and Social Commission for Asia and the Pacific, into a non-United Nations organization, in accordance with Commission resolution 74/5, which is annexed to the present resolution.

text_en: Recalling further the agreement between the Government of Indonesia and the United Nations concerning the accommodation of the Centre, signed on 29 April 1981,

text_en: Recalling that, at its sixty-sixth session, it supported, on the recommendation of the Governing Council of the Centre, the change of name of the Centre for Poverty Reduction through Secondary Crop Development in Asia and the Pacific, which became the Centre for Poverty Reduction through Sustainable Agriculture,

text_en: Recalling also its resolution 72/1 of 19 May 2016 on the revision of the statutes of the Centre for the Reduction of Poverty through Sustainable Agriculture,

text_fr: Consciente de  la  contribution  que  continue  d'apporter  le  Centre  pour  la rÃĐduction de la pauvretÃĐ par l'agriculture durable au dÃĐveloppement ÃĐconomique et social  des pays de la rÃĐgion Asie-Pacifique en faisant fonction de pÃīle rÃĐgional de connaissances et de formation en vue de l'accroissement de la production agricole, du  renforcement  de  la  sÃĐcuritÃĐ  alimentaire  et  de  l'amÃĐlioration  des  moyens  de subsistance des populations rurales, ainsi qu'en offrant un cadre pour la concertation, la coopÃĐration technique Sud-Sud et l'apprentissage mutuel dans ces domaines,
text_en: Recognizing the continued contribution of the Centre for Poverty Reduction through Sustainable Agriculture to the economic and social development of the countries of the Asia-Pacific region as a regional knowledge and training hub for increased agricultural production, food security and improved livelihoods of rural populations, as well as providing a framework for policy dialogue, South-South technical cooperation and mutual learning in these areas,

text_en: Noting with appreciation the financial resources and facilities provided to the Centre by the Government of Indonesia, as well as the support provided by other members and associate members,

text_fr: Ayant  examinÃĐ le  rapport  du  Conseil  d'administration  du  Centre  sur  sa quatorziÃĻme session 1 , dans lequel le Conseil a fait le point de maniÃĻre dÃĐtaillÃĐe sur la situation  administrative  et  financiÃĻre  du  Centre  et  passÃĐ  en  revue  les  diffÃĐrentes possibilitÃĐs quant Ã  l'avenir de celui-ci et Ã  la poursuite de ses activitÃĐs, notamment par le renforcement du sentiment d'appropriation parmi ses membres,
text_en: Having considered the report of the Governing Council of the Centre on its fourteenth session, 1 in which the Council gave a detailed overview of the administrative and financial situation of the Centre and reviewed the various possibilities for the future of the Centre and its continued activities, including through the strengthening of the sense of ownership among its members,

items_fr: 1. Approuve le  rapport  du  Conseil  d'administration  du  Centre  pour  la rÃĐduction de la pauvretÃĐ par l'agriculture durable sur sa quatorziÃĻme session 1 ;

items_en: 1. Approves the report of the Governing Council of the Centre for Poverty Reduction through Sustainable Agriculture on its fourteenth session; 1

2. Notes with satisfaction the announcement by the Government of Indonesia that it will lead and support the transformation of the Centre into a new intergovernmental organization not affiliated with the United Nations system and that other members of the Governing Council have proposed to support this transition process alongside Indonesia;
3. Encourages all members and associate members to support the new organization by participating in defining its objectives, programmes and activities;
4. Encourages all members and associate members and other relevant stakeholders to support the new organization, inter alia,

text_fr: mais pas uniquement, en fournissant des contributions volontaires, financiÃĻres ou en nature ;
text_en: but not only by providing voluntary, financial or in-kind contributions;

items_fr: 5. Note que  le  Conseil  d'administration  du  Centre  a  recommandÃĐ  que  la nouvelle organisation lui fasse rapport sur ses activitÃĐs ;
6. Note  ÃĐgalement l'intention  du  Gouvernement  indonÃĐsien  d'ÃĐtablir  une ÃĐquipe spÃĐciale chargÃĐe de la transition ;

a) De  prendre  toutes  les  mesures  administratives  et  juridiques  nÃĐcessaires selon  qu'il  conviendra,  d'ici  au  30  juin  2018,  pour  aider  le  Centre,  jusqu'alors  un organe subsidiaire, Ã  se transformer en une nouvelle organisation ;
b) De coopÃĐrer avec la nouvelle organisation et de poursuivre ce partenariat, selon qu'il conviendra ;

c) De  prendre  des  mesures  pour  assurer  le  transfert  des  financements volontaires non dÃĐpensÃĐs Ã  la nouvelle organisation, dans les conditions prÃĐvues par le  RÃĻglement  financier  et  les  rÃĻgles  de  gestion  financiÃĻre  de  l'Organisation  des Nations Unies 2 ;

d) De faire apparaÃŪtre les changements dÃĐcoulant des dÃĐcisions ci-dessus dans le  rapport  sur  l'examen  Ã   mi-parcours  de  l'appareil  de  confÃĐrence  qu'elle  lui prÃĐsentera Ã  sa soixante-quinziÃĻme session, en 2019 ;
e) De lui rendre compte Ã  sa soixante-seiziÃĻme session des progrÃĻs accomplis dans l'application de la prÃĐsente rÃĐsolution.
items_en: 5. Notes that the Board of Trustees of the Centre recommended that the new organization report on its activities;
6. Also notes the intention of the Government of Indonesia to establish a task force on transition;
(a) To take all necessary administrative and legal measures, as appropriate, by 30 June 2018, to assist the Centre, previously a subsidiary body, in its transformation into a new organization;
(b) To cooperate with the new organization and to continue this partnership, as appropriate;
(c) To take measures to ensure the transfer of unspent voluntary funding to the new organization, in accordance with the Financial Regulations and Rules of the United Nations; 2

(d) To reflect the changes resulting from the above decisions in the report on the midterm review of the conference structure to be submitted to the General Assembly at its seventy-fifth session, in 2019;
(e) To report to the General Assembly at its seventy-sixth session on the progress made in the implementation of the present resolution.
